decks.notes: This Boros Aggro deck focuses on explosive early game aggression, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes utility cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm to deal with threats and control the board. The main win condition is Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, a powerful finisher that can quickly close out games. The deck is designed to apply pressure from the start and maintain momentum to secure victory before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temples, Utopia Sprawl, and Talisman of Impulse to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. Control elements come in the form of disruption with cards like Malevolent Rumble and Sire of Seven Deaths to control the board while utilizing cards like Kozilek's Return for removal and disruption. The deck also features cards like Arena of Glory and Devourer of Destiny for additional advantage and closing out games. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm opponents with powerful Eldrazi threats.

The main focus of this Aggro - Affinity deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with artifacts and aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives, Mox Opal, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to generate mana advantage and tempo while deploying threats such as Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary to pressure the opponent. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Metallic Rebuke provide additional utility and disruption, allowing the deck to control the game and close out matches efficiently. Overall, the deck excels at aggressive, artifact-based strategies in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck aims to quickly assemble the Amulet of Vigor combo with Primeval Titan to generate massive mana and land drops, enabling the player to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and utility lands. The deck includes various tools to search for combo pieces, protect against disruption, and effectively utilize the generated mana. By efficiently ramping and tutoring for key cards, the deck can consistently execute its game plan and overwhelm opponents with a powerful board presence and game-ending combos.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. Utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, this deck aims to apply constant pressure to your opponent's life total. With cards such as Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge, you can finish off your opponent even if they manage to stabilize the board. Seasoned Pyromancer and Guide of Souls help you maintain card advantage while flooding the board with threats. Overall, this deck is designed to be fast and relentless in its pursuit of victory.

The deck focuses on using cards like Living End and Wistfulness to cycle through the deck quickly, filling up the graveyard with creatures. Once enough creatures are in the graveyard, Living End can be cast to bring them all back onto the battlefield at once, overwhelming the opponent with a massive board presence. The deck also includes cards like Formidable Speaker and Generous Ent to help dig for the combo pieces, while using cards like Subtlety and Force of Negation to control the opponent and protect the combo.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of artifact creatures and efficient equipment. By playing cheap artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Tormod's Crypt, the deck can power up cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary while also utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Welding Jar for removal and protection. The use of Urza's Saga allows for continuous generation of powerful artifact threats, with cards like Arcbound Ravager and Shadowspear providing additional support. The deck's focus on aggressive plays and artifact synergy helps to create a strong and fast-paced game plan.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure to the opponent with low-cost, aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while utilizing spells like Lava Dart and Lightning Bolt to control the board and deal direct damage. Mishra's Bauble provides card advantage and helps trigger prowess abilities, while mana fixing from lands like Arid Mesa and Steam Vents ensures consistent plays. The deck aims to win the game quickly through a combination of creature damage and burn spells, maintaining tempo and overwhelming the opponent.

This Ruby Storm deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Ruby Medallion, Desperate Ritual, and Pyretic Ritual to cast powerful spells to generate storm count. The goal is to generate a high storm count to finish off the opponent with a lethal Grapeshot or a powerful Ral, Monsoon Mage ultimate ability. The deck also includes cards like Wrenn's Resolve and Flashback to help dig for combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck utilizes a mix of burn spells, card draw, and mana acceleration to create explosive turns and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck utilizes a combination of cheap spells and rituals to quickly generate mana and cast powerful storm spells like Grapeshot, while utilizing cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Glimpse the Impossible to dig for combo pieces and draw cards. By chaining spells together and generating a large storm count, the deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn. The deck focuses on efficiency and speed to overwhelm opponents before they have a chance to respond, making it a high-risk, high-reward strategy in the Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on playing quickly and aggressively to overwhelm the opponent with low-cost spells and creatures. It aims to ramp up mana quickly using Birthing Ritual and Shardless Agent to cheat creatures into play. The deck utilizes a mix of countermagic and disruption to control the board and protect its threats. With a mix of card draw, removal, and evasion, this deck aims to apply pressure while maintaining card advantage and tempo. Overall, the deck aims to win the game through a combination of efficient threats and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on the ramp and acceleration provided by cards like Arboreal Grazer, Wooded Foothills, and Green Sun's Zenith to quickly get Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle into play. Once Valakut is on the battlefield, the goal is to have multiple copies of it in play along with lands to trigger its ability and deal damage to the opponent. Cards like Dryad of the Ilysian Grove, Prismatic Omen, and Wrenn and Six help to ensure consistent land drops and ramp, while Malevolent Rumble and Lightning Bolt provide additional removal and burn to control the board and finish off the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively attack the opponent using cheap and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck aims to quickly apply pressure, control the board with cards like Slickshot Show-Off, and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Violent Urge. The deck also utilizes card advantage through cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to maintain momentum and ensure a consistent stream of threats.

This deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy that utilizes the Blink mechanic to disrupt the opponent and gain incremental advantages. By combining powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury with blink effects like Ephemerate, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board presence throughout the game. Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge provide removal and card advantage, while cards like Quantum Riddler and Teferi, Time Raveler offer disruption and control elements. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly while controlling the battlefield with blink effects.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using cards such as Lotus Bloom and Thundertrap Trainer to generate a significant amount of mana, while utilizing Suppression Ray and Hydroelectric Specimen to control the board. Goblin Charbelcher serves as the win condition by dealing massive amounts of damage to the opponent. The deck also includes counterspells and disruption to protect the combo and prevent the opponent from interfering with the game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card draw and additional control options to help maintain the deck's strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance to bring them back onto the battlefield for a big swing. It also has a lot of control elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With cards like Faithful Mending and Solitude for card advantage and removal, the deck aims to quickly set up the combo and win the game before the opponent can establish their own strategy.
